zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory de Willoughby於大約1328年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓時，她的父親Richard Willoughby VI19歲，母親Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby23歲。她於1349年與John Mallory在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory de Willoughby于大约1328年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓时，她的父亲Richard Willoughby VI19岁，母亲Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby23岁。她于1349年与John Mallory在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory de Willoughby was born about 1328, in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Richard Willoughby VI, was 19 and her mother, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, was 23. She married John Mallory in 1349, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory de Willoughby est née environ 1328, à Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Willoughby VI, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Mallory en 1349, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory de Willoughby um 1328 in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Willoughby VI 19 und ihre Mutter Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby 23. Sie hat 1349 in Nottinghamshire, England John Mallory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory de Willoughby è nata il circa 1328 nel Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Richard Willoughby VI, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Mallory nel 1349, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory de Willoughbyが約1328年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオラトンで生まれた時，父Richard Willoughby VIは19歳，母Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughbyは23歳であった。1349年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでJohn Malloryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory de Willoughby(이)가 대략 1328년 영국 노틴그함실르 울라턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Willoughby VI(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 John Mallory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Walton, Leicestershire, England: Walton, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory de Willoughby nasceu aproximadamente 1328, em Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Willoughby VI, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Mallory em 1349, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory de Willoughby родилась около 1328 г. в местности воллатон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Willoughby VI было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mallory в 1349 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory de Willoughby nació aproximadamente 1328, en Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Willoughby VI, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Mallory en 1349, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
